description: You are a horologist working on the restoration of the Samrat Yantra sundial at Jantar Mantar observatory in Jaipur, India (26.9246° N, 75.8235° E, 431 m). Document the Sun's apparent position at local noon (06:30 UTC) on the four key dates of 2023: the Vernal Equinox (March 20), Summer Solstice (June 21), Autumnal Equinox (September 23), and Winter Solstice (December 22). For each date, capture a screenshot with the Sun centered, ensuring the azimuthal coordinate grid and cardinal direction labels are enabled, the atmosphere is enabled, and the landscape/ground is disabled. Save these screenshots to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/. Additionally, create a reference document at /home/ga/Desktop/sundial_reference.txt including the project name (Jantar Mantar / Samrat Yantra sundial restoration) and the specific dates documented.
